chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1795 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ For orders as to maintainability of petition 13.05.2025 Petitioner, Adv. Tayyaba Maher Iqbal, is present in person On the last date following order was passed: “2-4. Learned counsel is confronted as to maintainability hereof inter alia as there is no apparent locus standi of the petitioner, writ is sought against a private respondent, negative declaration is being sought and factual controversies are sought to be agitated herein. To come up on 13.05.2025” Today learned counsel remains unable to satisfy as to maintainability. Petition found to be misconceived is dismissed in limine. Judge Judge Amjad
